summary_en: 2,300,000 shares (0.90% of S/O) acquired on 2026-05-15 via ToSTNeT-3 at ¥2,921/share for total ¥6.72B. Block executes against authorized program of 5,200,000 shares (2.04% S/O) up to ¥12.0B through 2026-08-31.
title_en: Notice of acquisition results for treasury shares via off-exchange trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Nippon Television Holdings executed a treasury share acquisition on 2026-05-15 via off-exchange trading (ToSTNeT-3). The company purchased 2,300,000 shares at ¥2,921 per share for a total consideration of ¥6.718 billion. This block execution is part of an authorized program approved by the Board on 2026-05-14, which permits acquisition of up to 5,200,000 shares (2.04% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury holdings) for up to ¥12.0 billion through 2026-08-31 using ToSTNeT-3 and open-market methods. The stated rationale is shareholder return and capital efficiency improvement. As of 2026-05-15, the program has consumed 2,300,000 of the 5,200,000 authorized shares and ¥6.718 billion of the ¥12.0 billion limit.
